description: Build a minimal cos CLI — demo multi-agent plan

tasks.title: Design cos CLI UX and slash commands
tasks.description: Define the terminal UX, session model, and the slash command set for the cos chatroom interface. Output a structured UX decisions document to knowledge/plans/cos-cli-demo-20260320/ux-design.md.

tasks.title: Define HTTP protocol for controller /chat endpoint
tasks.description: Design the request/response shapes for POST /chat and GET /chat/history. Use the UX decisions from the design step. Output schema to knowledge/plans/cos-cli-demo-20260320/protocol.md.

tasks.title: Add /chat endpoints to the controller
tasks.description: Implement POST /chat and GET /chat/history in the Go controller. Use the protocol spec from cos-protocol.

tasks.title: Implement cos CLI Go binary
tasks.description: Build cmd/cos/ — the terminal chatroom binary. Readline loop, slash commands, model routing. Uses the protocol spec from cos-protocol.

tasks.title: Wire cos CLI binary to controller and test
tasks.description: Connect the CLI binary to the controller API. Write integration tests. Depends on both the controller API and the CLI binary.
